species: We sought to identify PKA phosphorylation sites in PLIN5 and assess their functional relevance in cultured cells and the livers of mice.
tissue: Expression of phosphorylation-defective PLIN5 S155A in Plin5 null cells resulted in decreased rates of lipolysis and triglyceride-derived fatty acid oxidation.
cell_type: PLIN5 is highly expressed in the liver and is an important regulator of hepatic lipid metabolism.
disease_state: We previously reported that Plin5LKO mice have impaired glucose tolerance and are insulin-resistant...

age: Wt and Plin5LKO mice aged 8 weeks were fed a high-fat diet...

sex: Male mice were used for all experiments.
